name: mongoose-construct-hook
description: Mongoose plugin: pre/post construct hooks that fire when documents are instantiated (new Model() or hydrated from DB)

scripts.build: tsup && cp src/mongoose-extend.d.ts dist/ && printf '/// <reference path="./mongoose-extend.d.ts" />\n' | cat - dist/index.d.ts > dist/index.d.ts.tmp && mv dist/index.d.ts.tmp dist/index.d.ts
